use_cases: Display user comments with profile information and timestamps in discussion threads
Show comment content in social media, blog, or forum applications
Provide a like/heart interaction counter for comment engagement
Build threaded comment sections in SaaS collaboration tools
ai_summary: A flat-design comment card component that displays user profile information, timestamp, and comment content with a heart/like button and counter. Features inline SVG icons for the user avatar and like interaction. Designed for discussion threads in social apps, blogs, or SaaS collaboration platforms.
